rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal

rulings.Case Title: MARTHA MIRANDA ET AL VS. WILLIAM F. CONDON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October 25, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT WILLIAM CONDON DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Defendant improperly raises issues of fact on a demurrer. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. ERIK LUNDGREN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October 25, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT ERIK LUNDGREN To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment is DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden for discretionary or mandatory relief under CCP 473(b). =(501/REQ)
